evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods
evidence.domain_risk: Serve as primary contact for both clients and team
evidence.data_team_maturity: Lead software development teams and projects
evidence.jd_authorship: Lead software development teams and projects; Inspire and develop team members; Provide resources (technology, skills, capacity) for success
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Develop client relationships and seek new opportunities
evidence.autonomy_level: Lead software development teams and projects; Support sales and client acquisition
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods; Contribute to process and tool development
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role blends ongoing performance monitoring and improvement of existing methods with contributing to new process and tool development, spanning both fix/scale and greenfield work.
evidence.work_arrangement: Flexible hybrid work and work-life balance - Modern offices in Tallinn and Tartu
evidence.ai_role_explanation: This is a project/team leadership role in a software consultancy with no mention of AI tools, AI-assisted coding, or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The JD covers team leadership, client relationships, and Scrum process management but never mentions testing tools or frames data/software quality as an owned testing responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The framing centers on team leadership, client growth, and delivery performance, with no incident, SLO, compliance, or regulatory trust language present.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Emphasis on process improvement and monitoring signals a rigour-oriented approach; no velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Client-facing software development role affects business decisions and revenue but lacks financial or regulatory compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Role assumes established software development function exists, though this is a team lead rather than data-specific role.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Entirely generic management boilerplate with no technical specificity, scale context, or tool/methodology detail.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary responsibilities emphasize client relationship development and supporting GTM/sales activities.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role combines strategic leadership of team direction (lead, develop) with execution support for business-set objectives (support sales).
